description: Circuito Nacional de Música Autoral e Intercâmbio Cultural — Cerrado brasileiro, música autoral, cultura, hora dourada.

pieces.name: hero
pieces.prompt: Cinematic editorial hero for a Brazilian cultural music circuit rooted in the Cerrado savanna. Wide golden-hour landscape of the Brazilian Cerrado — twisted ipê and baru trees, dry golden grasses, warm red earth, distant blue-dusk hills — with a lone acoustic guitar silhouette and soft dust catching volumetric sunlight. Warm and soulful atmosphere, burnt-gold and terracotta palette accented with sage green and dusk blue, dramatic rim light, fine film grain, shallow depth of field, painterly and reverent, museum print quality, ultra-detailed, no text, no logo, no watermark, no words

pieces.name: circuito
pieces.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of an open-air community music gathering at dusk in the Brazilian Cerrado, warm string lights, musicians and diverse audience in silhouette, golden and terracotta tones with dusk-blue sky, gentle dust and haze, intimate cultural celebration, film grain, editorial documentary aesthetic, ultra-detailed, no text, no logo, no watermark, no words
